final_prompt.prompt:
Create a food-photography style close-up of a bowl of Japanese ramen.

Style/medium: needs a food-photography aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be close-up with chopsticks lifting noodles
Subject: must include tonkotsu broth, chashu, soft-boiled egg, nori, scallions
Scene/backdrop: must be blurred background (bokeh)
Lighting/mood: needs an appetizing, steamy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include steam rising from the bowl
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
